name.zh: 地端 AI 會議助理

businessChallenge.zh: 公司計畫打造地端 AI 會議助理，具備語音轉錄與會議摘要功能。方案需支援未來部署於邊緣硬體，同時讓 Junior 工程師能維護與擴展。
businessChallenge.en: The company planned to build an on-premise AI meeting assistant capable of speech transcription and meeting summarization. The solution had to support future deployment on edge hardware while remaining maintainable by junior engineers.

technicalStrategy.zh: 未立即動手開發功能，而是先評估 Whisper.cpp、本地 LLM 部署、後端框架與部署選項。驗證可行性後，設計模組化的 FastAPI + React 架構，搭配可重用的 API 模組。
technicalStrategy.en: Instead of immediately building features, I first evaluated Whisper.cpp, local LLM deployment, backend frameworks, and deployment options. After validating feasibility, I designed a modular FastAPI + React architecture with reusable API modules.

text.zh: 單次工程迭代即完成架構建立
text.en: Architecture established in a single engineering iteration

text.zh: 可重用的專案 scaffold 已就緒
開發環境已驗證，Junior 工程師可立即接手功能實作
text.en: Development environment verified; junior engineers could immediately continue feature implementation

lessonsLearned.zh: AI 能大幅加速軟體交付，但前提是架構與職責在實作開始前就已明確定義。
lessonsLearned.en: AI dramatically accelerates software delivery when architecture and responsibilities are clearly defined before implementation.

problem.zh: 公司計畫打造地端 AI 會議助理，具備語音轉錄與會議摘要功能。方案需支援未來部署於邊緣硬體，同時讓 Junior 工程師能維護與擴展。
problem.en: The company planned to build an on-premise AI meeting assistant capable of speech transcription and meeting summarization. The solution had to support future deployment on edge hardware while remaining maintainable by junior engineers.

solution.zh: 評估技術可行性後，設計模組化 FastAPI + React 架構，搭配可重用 API 模組與 OpenAPI 規格。
solution.en: After feasibility validation, designed modular FastAPI + React architecture with reusable API modules and OpenAPI specs.

text.zh: 單次工程迭代即完成架構建立，Junior 工程師可立即接手功能實作
text.en: Architecture established in one iteration; juniors could immediately continue feature implementation
